property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: drain_publishesUnpublishedEventsAndMarksThemPublished
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Administrator\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.18.10\byte-buddy-agent-1.18.10.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: drain_leavesEventUnpublishedWhenKafkaFails
